2603.17588.title: From Isolated Scoring to Collaborative Ranking: A Comparison-Native Framework for LLM-Based Paper Evaluation
2603.17588.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are currently applied to scientific paper evaluation by assigning an absolute score to each paper independently. However, since score scales vary across conferences, time periods, and evaluation criteria, models trained on absolute scores are prone to fitting narrow, context-specific rules rather than developing robust scholarly judgment. To overcome this limitation, we propose shifting paper evaluation from isolated scoring to collaborative ranking. In particular, we design \textbf{C}omparison-\textbf{N}ative framework for \textbf{P}aper \textbf{E}valuation (\textbf{CNPE}), integrating comparison into both data construction and model learning. We first propose a graph-based similarity ranking algorithm to facilitate the sampling of more informative and discriminative paper pairs from a collection. We then enhance relative quality judgment through supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning with comparison-based rewards. At inference, the model performs pairwise comparisons over sampled paper pairs and aggregates these preference signals into a global relative quality ranking. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves an average relative improvement of \textbf{21.8\%} over the strong baseline DeepReview-14B, while exhibiting robust generalization to five previously unseen datasets. \href{https://github.com/ECNU-Text-Computing/ComparisonReview}{Code}.
2603.17588.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）目前應用於科學論文評估，通過為每篇論文獨立分配絕對分數。然而，由於分數範圍在不同會議、時間段和評估標準之間有所不同，基於絕對分數訓練的模型容易適應狹窄的、特定上下文的規則，而不是發展出穩健的學術判斷。為了克服這一限制，我們建議將論文評估從孤立的打分轉變為協作排名。特別是，我們設計了\textbf{C}omparison-\textbf{N}ative框架，用於\textbf{P}aper \textbf{E}valuation（\textbf{CNPE}），將比較整合到數據構建和模型學習中。我們首先提出了一種基於圖的相似性排名算法，以促進從集合中抽取更具信息性和區分性的論文對。我們然後通過基於比較的獎勵進行監督微調和強化學習，增強相對質量判斷。在推理階段，模型對抽樣的論文對進行成對比較，並將這些偏好信號聚合成一個全局相對質量排名。實驗結果表明，我們的框架在強基準DeepReview-14B上實現了平均相對提升\textbf{21.8\%}，同時對五個之前未見過的數據集展現了穩健的泛化能力。 \href{https://github.com/ECNU-Text-Computing/ComparisonReview}{代碼}。
2603.17588.author: Pujun Zheng et.al.
2603.17588.authors: Pujun Zheng, Jiacheng Yao, Jinquan Zheng, Chenyang Gu, Guoxiu He, Jiawei Liu, Yong Huang, Tianrui Guo, Wei Lu
